title: Is it true Shinji turned 15 right before EoE
display_title: Is it true Shinji turned 15 right before EoE
wikitext:
[]: Is it true Shinji turned 15 right before EoE?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Jun 20, 2009 3:59 pm I recall reading this somewhere, but not where. Also, that EoE took place in 2016. Does this sound familiar?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 20, 2009 4:15 pm Uhh, Asuka turned 14 shortly before EoE, but that's all. Shinji's birthday is in June, he turned 14 that year. Asuka is 13 for most of the series and her birthday is in December. For the timeline of EoTV/EoE, it's discussed here (This page still needs work): [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_Timeline#2016[/url] wrote: # The events of Episode 25 and 26 occur (Most likely New Years Eve/Day?) 2016, based on the tel-op. # The events of The End of Evangelion occur. Based on Maya's laptop in EoE, it occurs no later than December 31st 2015 given when the series ending happens.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 20, 2009 7:20 pm Well, Asuka (December 4th) and Toji (December 26). And Kaworu died shortly before EoE, but I suspect you already knew that.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Jun 20, 2009 8:18 pm Huh, so there's a fault between EoE and the TV ending after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 20, 2009 9:17 pm Not necessarily. If all of 25 and 26 happen during 26', there's not really an issue.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Jun 21, 2009 12:39 am Shinji turned 15, but everyone (himself included) was too depressed to notice it. EDIT: WTF? I was going to use the word "emo," but it got changed to "bosnian!" Bosnians aren't emo! They're f*cking genocide victims!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 21, 2009 2:42 am @LeoXiao LurkMore

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sun Jun 21, 2009 3:34 am I assumed instrumentality was on January sixth, for some reason. Oh Mr. Tines, you can be so cruel. Any other wordfilters we should be aware of?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 21, 2009 3:56 am Mr. Anno. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sun Jun 21, 2009 7:01 pm Legendary wrote: Not necessarily. If all of 25 and 26 happen during 26', there's not really an issue.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 21, 2009 7:17 pm There is a lot of day to night shifting in EoE, there's nothing wrong with the fact by the time 3I actually occurred it was already the new year. Also, Legendary: What's so bad with most of 25 happening in 25', and the rest happening in 26'? The year would still be 2015 into 2016 and all.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:43 am Iunno, that seems a rather significant detail to leave out of the story. I think they wanted to throw the 2016 detail in there for the TV ending for the sake of vagueness--the new year possibly representing Shinji's change in disposition shown at the end of 26.
